# Summary

Describe what this pull request changes and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup

## Affected operations

- [ ] Move
- [ ] Copy
- [ ] Fast Delete
- [ ] Move + Symlink
- [ ] Launcher / startup
- [ ] None (docs/CI only)

## Checklist

- [ ] `Invoke-ScriptAnalyzer -Path . -Recurse -Settings .\PSScriptAnalyzerSettings.psd1` reports no issues
- [ ] The script still parses without errors
- [ ] Tested the changed behavior on small, disposable folders
- [ ] Updated `README.md` and `CHANGELOG.md` if behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets, logs, or local-only files are included
